title: Mark Cotta Vaz
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Image|person}}
'''Mark Cotta Vaz''' is the author of several ''[[Star Wars]]'' "Behind the scenes" books. He also compiled the ''[[Star FX]]'' section of the ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]''.

{{Author-stub}}

==Sources==
*''[[From Star Wars to Indiana Jones: The Best of the Lucasfilm Archives]]'' (with [[Shinji Hata]])
*''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''
*''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode II: Attack of the Clones]]''
*''[[The Complete Star Wars Trilogy Scrapbook]]''
*''[[The Galactic Empire Scrapbook]]''
*''[[The Rebel Alliance Scrapbook]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace The Official Souvenir Magazine]]'' (with [[Marc Patten]])
*''[[The Making of Star Wars: The Force Awakens]]''

[[Category:Non-fiction authors]]
